meta.title: photo2url — Instant Photo To URL
meta.description: No sign-up required. Upload → Get Link → Embed anywhere. Fast, free image hosting.

hero.title: Free Photo To URL
hero.subtitle: Ctrl+V to paste. Get a link instantly. No sign-up, no ads.
hero.trustLine: Your photos hosted on Cloudflare. No ads.

upload.title: Free Image to URL Converter
upload.pasteHint: Or drag & drop, or click to browse
upload.verify: Please verify you're human to continue uploading
upload.trySample: No photo handy? Try one of these.
upload.tryAnother: No photo handy? Try one of these.
upload.signupDesc: Create a free account to view, copy, and delete your uploads anytime.

step1.title: 1. Paste
step1.desc: Ctrl+V your photo. No file picker, no sign-up. Done.

step2.title: 2. Copy
step2.desc: Direct URL + Markdown + HTML, ready to paste anywhere. No gallery, no ads.

step3.title: 3. Embed
step3.desc: Paste the link anywhere — Notion, Reddit, GitHub, Jira, and more.

items.title: GitHub
items.desc: Bug reports need screenshots. Paste the markdown here.

items.title: Notion
items.desc: Notion's image upload is clunky. Ctrl+V here instead.

items.title: Reddit
items.desc: Reddit comments can't attach images. A direct URL can.

items.title: Jira / Linear
items.desc: Screenshots on tickets, no storage bloat for the project.

items.title: Slack / Discord
items.desc: Free Discord caps at 8 MB. Your link doesn't.

items.title: Blogs & Docs
items.desc: Markdown image syntax needs a real URL. That's all we give you.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay for what you need. Nothing you don't.
pricing.enterpriseHint: For teams that need their own image CDN and unlimited everything.

items.title: Ctrl+V, not a file picker
items.desc: Your photo is already on your clipboard. Paste it. That's it.

items.title: A link, not a page
items.desc: A raw image URL opens everywhere. No gallery, no comments, no junk.

family.title: Family
family.desc: No app to install. One link, everyone sees it.

team.title: Team
team.desc: Screenshots in tickets. Mockups in chat. Docs everyone can open.

creator.title: Creator
creator.desc: Full-size, no compression. Share your work, not a tiny thumbnail.

teamsSaving.title: Teams saving time with Photo To URL
teamsSaving.subtitle: The numbers speak for themselves.

brand.description: Upload images and get instant shareable links. No sign-up required. Perfect for embedding in Notion, Reddit, GitHub, and everywhere else.

language.chooseLang: Choose your preferred language and region

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: We collect minimal data to provide our service. Uploaded files are stored securely on Cloudflare R2. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. For free users, files are automatically removed after 30 days. Paid users retain their files until they cancel their subscription. We use cookies for authentication and security purposes. By using this service, you agree to this privacy policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using photo2url, you agree not to upload illegal, harmful, or copyrighted content without permission. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these terms. The service is provided 'as is' without warranty. We are not liable for any damages resulting from the use of our service. Free tier users are subject to daily upload limits and automatic file cleanup after 30 days. Paid plans are governed by the terms of our payment provider, Lemon Squeezy.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.content: If you are not satisfied with your paid subscription, you may request a refund within 7 days of purchase. Refunds are processed through Lemon Squeezy, our payment provider. To request a refund, please contact support at support@photo2url.com with your order details. After the 7-day window, subscriptions are non-refundable. Canceling a subscription stops future charges but does not refund the current billing period.
